calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Conveying Title To Property
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Application For Determination That Proposed Petition For Order Instructing Trustees As To Construction Of Trust Amendment Is Not A Contest Within The
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Victoria Kaempf for Carol Daniels.

The Court reviewed the petition and found that filing the Petition For Order Instructing Trustees As To Construction Of Trust Amendment is not a contest within the meaning of any applicable no contest clause. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Jackson.

Application For Determination That Proposed Petition For Order Instructing Trustees As To Construction Of Trust Amendment Is Not A Contest Within The
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Continued To Apr-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
